Package com.stardevllc.starmclib.color

Class CustomColor

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starmclib.color.CustomColor
public class CustomColor extends Object
This class represents a custom color value
This is created using builder-style methods
You only need to call one of the following awtColor(Color), hexValue(String), rgbValue(int, int, int) or spigotColor(ChatColor). The other values will be populated automatically.

  • Constructor Details

    • CustomColor

      public CustomColor(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin owner)
      Constructs a new color
      Parameters:
      owner - The owner plugin.

  • Method Details

    • symbolCode

      public CustomColor symbolCode(String symbolCode)
      Sets the symbol code for this color
      Parameters:
      symbolCode - The 2 character code. See the ColorUtils.COLOR_CODE_PATTERN for valid values. Just like normal chat colors, but with custom characters.
      Returns:
      Builder style instance

    • hexValue

      public CustomColor hexValue(String hex)
      Set the hex value. This will populate the other values stored as well
      Parameters:
      hex - The color value in hex format.
      Returns:
      Builder style instance

    • rgbValue

      public CustomColor rgbValue(int red, int green, int blue)
      Sets the color value using RGB values
      Parameters:
      red - The red value between 0 and 255
      green - The green value between 0 and 255
      blue - The blue value between 0 and 255
      Returns:
      Builder style instance

    • getChatCode

      public String getChatCode()
      Returns:
      The user-friendly chat code of this color

    • spigotColor

      public CustomColor spigotColor(net.md_5.bungee.api.ChatColor color)
      Sets the color value based on the BungeeCord ChatColor enum
      Parameters:
      color - The color
      Returns:
      Builder style instance

    • awtColor

      public CustomColor awtColor(Color color)
      Sets the color value based on the Java AWT color
      Parameters:
      color - The awt color
      Returns:
      Builder style instance

    • permission

      public CustomColor permission(String permission)
      Sets the permission for this color (Only works with calls to the methods that take in a CommandSender
      Parameters:
      permission - The permission
      Returns:
      Builder style instance

      public org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin getOwner()
      Returns:
      The owning plugin

      The prefix symbol

    • getCode

    • getPermission

      Returns:
      The permission needed for this color.
